questions: gender equality ki shudhu women er jonno?
How can we promote gender equality?
answers: Gender equality means all genders have equal rights, responsibilities, and opportunities in education, work, health, and all areas of life.
Gender equality holo sob gender er soman odhikar ar sujog thaka — chakri, shikkhya, health, ar jibon er sob khetre.
Gender equality benefits everyone — it leads to stronger economies, healthier families, and more peaceful societies. It's not just a women's issue, it's a human issue.
We can promote gender equality by challenging stereotypes, supporting equal pay, encouraging education for all, and calling out discrimination when we see it.
